hallucination.rationale: The HPI content that was filled in is accurate to the transcript. However, the note is essentially just the template with only the Chief Complaint and HPI filled in, so there is minimal opportunity for hallucination. No fabricated clinical details are present.

instruction_following.rationale: The note catastrophically fails instruction following. Template placeholder text (brackets, parenthetical instructions) is left throughout the entire note in every section except CC and HPI. The template instructions explicitly state to replace placeholders, omit sections not discussed, or state 'Not documented' — none of this was done. The note is duplicated approximately 25+ times.

completeness.rationale: The note only captures the chief complaint and HPI. It is missing all objective findings (wheezing, O2 sat, peak flow), assessment (asthma exacerbation, allergic rhinitis), the entire plan (Advair, cetirizine, Flonase, spacer, exercise counseling, return precautions, follow-up), past medical history (asthma), medications (fluticasone 110, albuterol, Claritin), and all counseling provided.
missed_items: expiratory wheezing bilaterally worse on right
fluticasone 110 one puff twice daily (inconsistent use)
counseling on daily maintenance inhaler use
counseling on mouth rinsing after inhaled steroid
counseling on LABA safety in combination inhaler

template_adherence.rationale: Template placeholder text and instructions are left verbatim throughout the entire note. Sections that should have been filled in or omitted per instructions are left as raw template. The Review of Systems includes all systems with placeholder text despite the instruction to only include discussed systems.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted anywhere in the note. No {{drug:...}} or {{condition:...}} syntax is present.

duplication.rationale: The entire note structure is duplicated approximately 25+ times, which is an extreme case of output duplication.
